title: CCL - Restore defaults
scenario: CCL (Call Clarity Level) does not reset to "UC Noise Block" after restoring device to default settings via Device Settings > Reset Device > Restore
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a CCL-supported Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. Locate the Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting and change it to either 'No Noise Block' or 'AI Noise Block'.
8. Tap on 'Restore' to restore the device to default settings.
9. After the reset completes, navigate back to Device Settings > Advanced.
10. Check the Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting.
expected: The Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting should revert to "UC Noise Block" after restoring device defaults.
